Lucy Mallory is the wife of a cavalry officer stationed in Lordsburg, and she's determined to be with him. Hatfield is a smooth-talking cardsharp who claims to be along to "protect" Lucy, although he seems to have romantic intentions. Dr. Boone is a self-styled philosopher, drunkard and physician who's been stripped of his license. Mr. Peacock is a nervous whiskey salesman. Gatewood is a crooked banker who needs to get out of town. Buck is the hayseed stage driver, and Sheriff Wilcox is along to offer protection and keep an eye peeled for the Ringo Kid, a well-known outlaw who has just broken out of jail. While Wilcox does find Ringo, a principled man who gives himself up without a fight, the real danger lies farther down the trail, where a band of Apaches, led by Geronimo, could attack at any time.

programme.desc: We spend our last day in Denali National Park before relocating to the charming town of Talkeetna. While in Talkeetna we meet the Mayor, hike to try to get another view of Denali, and catch a glimpse of our first ever salmon run!

programme.title: Lost And Found
programme.desc: After leaving Talkeetna we head to the long awaited Hatcher Pass. Neither one of us was ready for the rugged beauty of this area after nearly a month of Boreal Forests. We spend our time in the area hiking to turquoise lakes and make a surprise stop to...

programme.title: Lost And Found
programme.desc: This episode was life changing for us. We visit Katmai National Park and Preserve to visit the fishing bears of Brooks Falls. A place that has captivated us since we were kids. After a short flight and a float plane we arrive at the most incredible pla...

programme.title: Lost And Found
programme.desc: When we returned from Katmai National Park we venture onto the Kenai Peninsula for the first time in our travels in Alaska. We stop in the town of Whittier before heading to Homer, Alaska. While in Homer we meet up with some new friends for a trip acro...

programme.title: Savannah
programme.desc: Savannah was Georgia's very first city and remains one of the best preserved historic cities in the country. Join Jefferson Graham of Photowalks to capture photos featuring the heart of the American South.

programme.title: Osaka
programme.desc: On this episode of Photowalks, join Jefferson Graham in Osaka, Japan to explore the many shopping arcades. The stores in Osaka are often clustered together to attract foot traffic. The many indoor shopping areas also make it easier to shop during the often-rainy weather.

programme.title: The Sporting Life
programme.desc: Fumbles, stumbles, fouls and tumbles are imminent in these videos of blunderful sporting activities, including a wild game of Donkey Basketball.

programme.title: Vacation Destination
programme.desc: A tidal wave smackdown, the long embrace of an octopus and a van taking the wrong turn down a tight tunnel round out this video montage of vacation misadventures.

programme.title: Kids And Pets
programme.desc: Amusing “Kids and Pets” are on display in the top clips of a punching pony, stubborn kitties, a slapping alligator and rousing role reversals of people and pets.
